description: List of AndroidManifest.xml attributes that are known to cause AAPT/AAPT2 compilation failures due to version incompatibility.

attributes_to_remove.name: android:allowCrossUidActivitySwitchFromBelow
attributes_to_remove.reason: Often unsupported by bundled AAPT2 versions targeting older API levels.

attributes_to_remove.name: android:maxAspectRatio
attributes_to_remove.reason: Strict parsing issues in older AAPT builds.

attributes_to_remove.name: android:dataExtractionRules
attributes_to_remove.reason: New attribute for Android 12+ causing issues in older tooling.
